arts.ttl: Southampton youth product on unbelievable moment playing against Saints – And why it was so special
arts.sum: Southampton youth product Tim Sparv has admitted that beating them with FC Midtjylland in 2015 will remain one of the best moment of his playing career. The 38-year-old has been speaking to Tipsbladet about his playing career, which came to an end in 2022, as he celebrates his birthday.
